title: 第三幕　甘い香りは変わらない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I confront Fuji Kiseki, and she finally confesses
that she feels unworthy of everyone's
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fans' ardor—which borders on obsession—is
becoming too much for her to handle. She's afraid
she'll eventually fail and disappoint everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has given miracles to so many people. I
assure her that she's an incredible person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has given miracles to so many people. I
assure her that she's an incredible person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Fuji Kiseki to watch the younger student
she inspired train. She helped change her fellow
racer's life and encouraged her to face her future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My words renew her confidence, and Fuji Kiseki
realizes she's not alone. She believes we can
overcome anything together.
